content.Text:
[Tue 2026-04-21 16:21 CDT] Capture full ad creative screenshots for Price LeBlanc Lexus and Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge using Camoufox. We need clean, scrolled screenshots showing actual ad content — vehicle images, headlines, copy, offers.

## Setup
Use /opt/homebrew/bin/python3
Script at ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/ad-scraper/capture_ad_creatives.py already exists.

## Run for both dealers:

```bash
cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/ad-scraper

# Price LeBlanc Lexus — Meta ads
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 capture_ad_creatives.py "Price LeBlanc Lexus"

# Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge — Meta ads  
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 capture_ad_creatives.py "Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge"
```

## Also run Google Ads Transparency for both (domain-based search works best):

```bash
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 google_ads.py "priceleblanclexus.com"
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 google_ads.py "mbobr.com"
```

## The goal
We want screenshots that show:
- Actual vehicle images in the ads
- Ad headlines and copy text
- Any pricing or offers shown
- Call to action buttons

For Meta: the capture_ad_creatives.py script scrolls through the ad library and captures at multiple scroll positions. Make sure to get scroll positions 0, 400, 800, 1200px minimum.

For Google: take screenshots AFTER the search executes and results load.

## Copy ALL screenshots to workspace:
```bash
cp /tmp/creatives_price_leblanc_lexus/*.png ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/price-leblanc-lexus/ 2>/dev/null
cp /tmp/creatives_mercedes-benz_of_baton_rouge/*.png ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/mercedes-br/ 2>/dev/null
cp /tmp/google_ads_*.png ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/ 2>/dev/null

mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/price-leblanc-lexus
mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/mercedes-br
```

## Report:
1. List every screenshot file captured for each dealer
2. Describe what's visible in the best 2-3 screenshots per dealer — actual ad content, vehicles, pricing, copy
3. Flag any that are clean enough to share with a client
I'll run the scripts for both dealers in parallel, starting with creating the output directories.

input.description: Capture Meta ad creatives for Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge

content.Text: Good, it exists. I'll wait for the Meta captures to finish, then run the Google ones. The Meta scripts are running in background — I'll be notified when they complete.

content.Text:
All 4 capture scripts are running in parallel:
1. Meta ads — Price LeBlanc Lexus
2. Meta ads — Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge
3. Google Ads — priceleblanclexus.com
4. Google Ads — mbobr.com

I'll report results as each completes.

content.Text: All 4 tasks still running — the Camoufox browser sessions take a bit to load and scroll. I'll wait for them to finish.

Thinking.text: All 4 tasks completed successfully. Now let me copy the screenshots and then review them.

content.Text: All 4 captures completed successfully. Now let me copy screenshots to the workspace and catalog them.

content.Text: All screenshots copied. Now let me review the best screenshots for each dealer.
Now let me check the Google Ads screenshots for both dealers.
Let me also look at a couple more Mercedes-Benz Meta screenshots to get a broader view of their ad creative variety.

Excellent — all captures are clean and loaded with real ad content. Here's the full report:

---
